title: Iran threatens Bab el-Mandeb closure — IRGC threatens both Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb; Hormuz 'effectively closed' since May 4
snippet: IRGC threatens to block both Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb strait over Israel's continuing Lebanon operations. Hormuz remains 'effectively closed' to Western-allied commercial shipping since May 4. Bab el-Mandeb threat would extend maritime disruption to Red Sea and Suez Canal route. Most expansive Iranian maritime threat since war began.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — IRGC가 호르무즈에 이어 바브엘만데브 해협 봉쇄도 위협. 전쟁 이래 가장 광범위한 해상 위협. 홍해-수에즈 항로까지 위협 확대
